title: polystichum minimum
intro: Polystichum minimum, also known as the Dwarf Lady Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the fern family (Dryopteridaceae) that is native to China. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum minimum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Polystichum minimum are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water or combining them with other herbs to create teas, infusions, or tinctures.
